summary: Completed frontend testing of 5 specific features for TeacherHubPro. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: SM Aprendizaje dialog opens with username (Usuario) and password (Contraseña) fields when clicking 'Iniciar Sesión' button
SM Aprendizaje dialog has 'Abrir SM Aprendizaje' button to open external site
Two-week date range displays on same line in print preview: 'Week 1: X - Y | Week 2: A - B'
Print view shows both weeks in header and detail sections
Gradebook page loads with 4 default categories: Tarea (25%), Prueba Corta (25%), Examen (30%), Proyecto (20%)
View Assignments button (Ver Tareas) opens assignment list dialog
Assignment list shows edit (pencil) and delete (trash) buttons for each assignment
Edit Assignment dialog opens with editable fields: title, category, points, due date
GPA/Letter grade calculation uses correct percentage scale: 90+=A (4.0), 80+=B (3.0), 70+=C (2.0), 60+=D (1.0), <60=F (0.0)
Assignment creation works with success toast 'Tarea creada'
seed_data_creation: Created test assignment 'Test Assignment for Edit' in Tarea category with 100 points
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features verified working: (1) SM Aprendizaje login dialog with username/password fields, (2) Two-week date range on same line in print view, (3) Gradebook categories display correctly, (4) View Assignments button and edit functionality working, (5) GPA calculation uses standard percentage scale. Database is 'teacherhub' (not test_database). Key data-testid attributes: sm-aprendizaje-btn, sm-username-input, sm-password-input, print-plan-btn, view-assignments-btn, new-assignment-btn

sm_aprendizaje_login.details: Dialog opens with 'Usuario' (username) and 'Contraseña' (password) input fields. 'Abrir SM Aprendizaje' button opens external site in new window.

two_week_date_range_print.details: Print view shows 'Date: Week 1: 2026-02-16 - 2026-02-20 | Week 2: 2026-02-23 - 2026-02-27' on same line in header. Second page also shows both weeks clearly.

gradebook_categories.details: Four default categories displayed: Tarea (25%), Prueba Corta (25%), Examen (30%), Proyecto (20%). Total weight = 100%.

view_assignments_and_edit.details: 'Ver Tareas' button opens 'Lista de Tareas' dialog showing all assignments with edit (pencil) and delete (trash) buttons. Edit dialog has title, category, points, due date fields with Save/Cancel buttons.

gpa_calculation.details: GPA_SCALE function correctly implements: 90%+=A (4.0 GPA), 80%+=B (3.0 GPA), 70%+=C (2.0 GPA), 60%+=D (1.0 GPA), <60%=F (0.0 GPA). Color coding applied for each grade level.

notes: All fixes from main agent verified working. BookOpen import was added to LessonPlanner.js. PlanPrintView.js correctly shows both weeks on same line. Gradebook.js has correct GPA_SCALE implementation.
